allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('elections.ts','utf8'\); const i=c.indexOf\('participationRate: Math.round\(participationRate'\); console.log\('found at:', i\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(c.slice\(i,i+100\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('elections.ts','utf8'\); const i=c.indexOf\('Math.round\(participationRate'\); console.log\(i\); if\(i>0\) console.log\(JSON.stringify\(c.slice\(i-10,i+80\)\)\);")
